tests.prompt: I have some assumptions about this ticket. Can you stress-test them against the evidence to avoid confirmation bias?
Challenge these assumptions by looking for contradictions in the codebase and ticket comments.
What evidence could disprove the assumptions we made during the debrief?
I want to avoid confirmation bias. Please challenge the assumptions formed from the ticket.
Search for disproof of the assumptions we just listed.
Form a list of assumptions from the ticket and evidence.
Calculate the overall confidence score for this ticket.
Can you ask the user to clarify these assumptions?

tests.name: Challenges assumption with direct contradiction
tests.description: Given an assumption and evidence that contradicts it, the script marks the assumption as challenged.

tests.name: Holds assumption when no contradiction exists
tests.description: Given an assumption with no contradicting evidence, the script marks it as holds.

tests.name: Returns needs_input when assumptions are missing
tests.description: When no assumptions are provided, the script returns status needs_input.

tests.name: Returns structured JSON envelope
tests.description: The script always returns a JSON object with status and assumptions keys.

tests.name: Consumes evidence from explore-code
tests.description: The skill should be selected when a conductor has assumptions and evidence from explore-code.
